Seishinkai Karate

About

Seishinkai Karate is a traditional dojo with over 50 years of history, offering training for all ages—from children to seniors. Unlike competition-focused styles, we emphasize physical development, health, self-defense, and mental strength.

For kids

Improve coordination, discipline, and confidence

For adults & seniors

Gentle full-body exercise and breathing techniques for health

For women

Practical self-defense and awareness training

For everyone

Build strength, resilience, and overall wellbeing

We welcome beginners, international residents in Sapporo, and anyone looking to start their karate journey.

Contact us to arrange for a free trial lesson.
